legacy_original.goal: upload real decoded frame data into D3D11 texture
legacy_original.required_repair: Real D3D11 texture upload with actual frame data

format_handling.yuv420p: 3 planes (Y, U, V) with separate linesizes

reality_proof_requirements.real_frame_data: frame_data must contain actual decoded pixels
reality_proof_requirements.real_linesize: linesize[4] must match actual frame layout
reality_proof_requirements.real_dimensions: width and height must match actual frame
reality_proof_requirements.real_data_upload: Real UpdateSubresource or map/unmap with actual frame data

required_reality_tests: YUV420P Upload Test: Upload real YUV420P frame data
NV12 Upload Test: Upload real NV12 frame data
RGB24 Upload Test: Upload real RGB24 frame data
Format Conversion Test: YUV→RGB conversion proof
Upload Verification Test: Verify texture contains uploaded data
Linesize Handling Test: Handle different linesize values
evidence_requirements: Real frame data in frame_data vector

inspector_snapshot_requirements.decoded_frame_upload_snapshot: frame_id, pixel_format, width, height, frame_data_size, linesize, upload_success, texture_width, texture_height, texture_format, upload_method, upload_verification

decision_ledger_requirements.upload_decision: Input: frame_id, pixel_format, width, height, frame_data_size; Output: upload_success, texture_format, upload_method, upload_verification

schema_gate_requirements.upload_success_required: upload_success must be true for RUNTIME_PASS
schema_gate_requirements.anti_fake_validation: no empty texture or dummy frame

real_upload_proof: Real frame data: frame_data contains actual decoded pixels
Real linesize: linesize[4] matches actual frame layout
Real texture creation: Real ID3D11Texture2D creation
Real data upload: Real UpdateSubresource call
Real upload verification: Texture contains uploaded data

workspace_requirements: No generated texture files in source root

classification_options: RUNTIME_PASS: Real decoded frame data uploaded to real D3D11 texture
BLOCKED_ENV: D3D11 environment unavailable, honest block
CONTRACT_PASS: Interface contract proven but not runtime
FAIL: Required proof missing or conflicting
forbidden_claims: Never claim real upload if empty texture
Never claim real upload if dummy frame
Never claim runtime PASS if BLOCKED_ENV
Never claim upload verification if not verified

legacy_original.reason: D3D11 real decoded frame upload planned. Current interface is stub implementation (CONTRACT_PASS). Real frame data upload with YUV420P/NV12/RGB24 formats required for RUNTIME_PASS. Format conversion and upload verification planned.
